Global Variable# FFERR_NOINTERFACE

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFERR_NOINTERFACE: HRESULT { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_nointerface#Discussion)

The specified interface is not supported by the object
